scripts.report:mochawesome: npx mochawesome-merge reports/mochawesome/*.json | npx mochawesome-report-generator --reportDir reports/mochawesome/final --saveHtml
scripts.report:html: npx mochawesome-merge reports/mochawesome/*.json > merged-report.json && npx mochawesome-report-generator merged-report.json --reportDir reports/mochawesome/final --saveHtml
scripts.generate:ci:report:html: npx mochawesome-merge 'reports/mochawesome/**/*.json' > merged-report.json && npx mochawesome-report-generator merged-report.json --reportDir reports/mochawesome/final --saveHtml
